cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, is this Jaya Gopalakrishnan? Sir, this is a follow-up call from Trend Micro regarding the software issue you reported earlier.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Haan, yes, this is Jaya. Achha, the issue was resolved, thank you for calling back.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Great to hear that, Jaya ji. We want to ensure you're completely satisfied with the support you received. Can you please confirm if the solution is still working for you?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Yes, everything seems fine now. Your team did a good job. Thik hai, I'm satisfied.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Excellent, thank you for your feedback, Jaya. We appreciate your time and business. Is there anything else we can assist you with today?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: No, that's all. Thank you again for the follow-up. I'm good, sir.

slow_thinking_rationale: At 84s: Conversation remains within policy guidelines. All requests are legitimate and follow proper procedures.

scenario_info.description: A support agent from [TECH_COMPANY] follows up on a resolved software issue to ask if the solution is still working and if the user is satisfied with the support they received.
